'''konadhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:rubberized|rubberized]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-n-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rubberized|rubberized]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| konadhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:konadhithi|konadhithi]] || [[word:konadhiji|konadhiji]] || [[word:konadhishi|konadhishi]] || [[word:konadhiki|konadhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:konadhuthuthu|konadhuthuthu]] || [[word:konadhujuju|konadhujuju]] || [[word:konadhushushu|konadhushushu]] || [[word:konadhukuku|konadhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:konadhuthu|konadhuthu]] || [[word:konadhuju|konadhuju]] || [[word:konadhushu|konadhushu]] || [[word:konadhuku|konadhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:konadhufthuf|konadhufthuf]] || [[word:konadhufjuf|konadhufjuf]] || [[word:konadhufshuf|konadhufshuf]] || [[word:konadhufkuf|konadhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:konadhethe|konadhethe]] || [[word:konadheje|konadheje]] || [[word:konadheshe|konadheshe]] || [[word:konadheke|konadheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:konadhothotho|konadhothotho]] || [[word:konadhojojo|konadhojojo]] || [[word:konadhoshosho|konadhoshosho]] || [[word:konadhokoko|konadhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:konadhotho|konadhotho]] || [[word:konadhojo|konadhojo]] || [[word:konadhosho|konadhosho]] || [[word:konadhoko|konadhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:konadhofthof|konadhofthof]] || [[word:konadhofjof|konadhofjof]] || [[word:konadhofshof|konadhofshof]] || [[word:konadhofkof|konadhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:konadhïfthïf|konadhïfthïf]] || [[word:konadhïfjïf|konadhïfjïf]] || [[word:konadhïfshïf|konadhïfshïf]] || [[word:konadhïfkïf|konadhïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:konadhïfthïfthïf|konadhïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:konadhïfjïfjïf|konadhïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:konadhïfshïfshïf|konadhïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:konadhïfkïfkïf|konadhïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:konadhïfthïf|konadhïfthïf]] || [[word:konadhïfjïf|konadhïfjïf]] || [[word:konadhïfshïf|konadhïfshïf]] || [[word:konadhïfkïf|konadhïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:konadhïfthïf|konadhïfthïf]] || [[word:konadhïfjïf|konadhïfjïf]] || [[word:konadhïfshïf|konadhïfshïf]] || [[word:konadhïfkïf|konadhïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:konadhæthæ|konadhæthæ]] || [[word:konadhæjæ|konadhæjæ]] || [[word:konadhæshæ|konadhæshæ]] || [[word:konadhækæ|konadhækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:konadhathatha|konadhathatha]] || [[word:konadhajaja|konadhajaja]] || [[word:konadhashasha|konadhashasha]] || [[word:konadhakaka|konadhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:konadhatha|konadhatha]] || [[word:konadhaja|konadhaja]] || [[word:konadhasha|konadhasha]] || [[word:konadhaka|konadhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:konadhafthaf|konadhafthaf]] || [[word:konadhafjaf|konadhafjaf]] || [[word:konadhafshaf|konadhafshaf]] || [[word:konadhafkaf|konadhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:konadhasha|konadhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:konadhshësha|konadhshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:konadhrosha|konadhrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:konadhmusha|konadhmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:konadhyasha|konadhyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokonadhnkshësha|gokonadhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokonadhnkrosha|gokonadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokonadhnkmusha|gokonadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokonadhnkyasha|gokonadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:konanadhasha|konanadhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:konanadhshësha|konanadhshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:konanadhrosha|konanadhrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:konanadhmusha|konanadhmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:konanadhyasha|konanadhyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokonanadhnkshësha|gokonanadhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokonanadhnkrosha|gokonanadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokonanadhnkmusha|gokonanadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokonanadhnkyasha|gokonanadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:kenædhasha|kenædhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kenædhshësha|kenædhshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kenædhrosha|kenædhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kenædhmusha|kenædhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kenædhyasha|kenædhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokenædhnkshësha|gokenædhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokenædhnkrosha|gokenædhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokenædhnkmusha|gokenædhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokenædhnkyasha|gokenædhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:konfadhasha|konfadhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:konfadhshësha|konfadhshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:konfadhrosha|konfadhrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:konfadhmusha|konfadhmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:konfadhyasha|konfadhyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokonfadhnkshësha|gokonfadhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokonfadhnkrosha|gokonfadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokonfadhnkmusha|gokonfadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokonfadhnkyasha|gokonfadhnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
